requirement.title: Boundary & Negative Test Case Generation
requirement.goal: Mo rong FE-05 (happy-path generation) them kha nang tu dong tao boundary va negative test cases bang 3 pipeline: rule-based path mutations, rule-based body mutations, va LLM-suggested scenarios qua n8n webhook. Bat buoc phai qua FE-05A gate (approved API order) truoc khi generate.
rationale: FE-05B chi cover happy-path, can them boundary/negative de dam bao API duoc test day du cac truong hop loi.
Rule-based mutations dam bao deterministic va khong can goi LLM cho cac case co ban (empty body, malformed JSON, missing required fields).
LLM suggestions bo sung cac scenario phuc tap ma rule-based khong cover duoc (business logic edge cases, semantic errors).
Cache LLM results 24h de giam chi phi va tang toc do khi regenerate.
Reuse toan bo entity model TestCase/TestCaseRequest/TestCaseExpectation tu FE-05B, chi khac TestType = Boundary|Negative.

inScope: Gate check FE-05A (approved/applied API order) truoc khi generate.
Rule-based path parameter mutations: null, empty, boundary values, overflow, invalid enum, wrong type, special characters, injection.
Rule-based body mutations: empty body, malformed JSON, missing required fields, type mismatch, overflow, invalid enum.
Schema-based mutations tu JSON schema (phat hien required fields chua co trong BodyParameters).
LLM scenario suggestions qua n8n webhook 'generate-boundary-negative-scenarios'.
LLM suggestion caching per-endpoint voi TTL 24h qua ILlmAssistantGatewayService.
LLM interaction audit logging qua LlmAssistant module.
Persist test cases trong transaction voi change log va suite version.
Force regenerate option de xoa va tao lai boundary/negative test cases.
User co the bat/tat tung pipeline rieng le (IncludePathMutations, IncludeBodyMutations, IncludeLlmSuggestions).
outOfScope: API order proposal va review gate (FE-05A).
UI review bulk operations cho LLM suggestion (FE-15..FE-17).

requiredFeatures.reason: Mandatory gate: phai co approved/applied API order truoc khi generate boundary/negative.
Endpoint metadata va parameter details (parsed tu OpenAPI/Postman spec).
Path parameter templating va mutation gateway service.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.ApiDocumentation
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Cross-module boundary via IApiEndpointMetadataService va IApiEndpointParameterDetailService. Khong truy cap truc tiep entity/repository.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Cross-module boundary via ILlmAssistantGatewayService. Dung de save interaction audit va cache suggestions.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.Subscription
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Cross-module boundary via ISubscriptionLimitGatewayService. Check va increment usage limits.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Contracts.Identity
requiredModules.usage: ICurrentUser de lay UserId cho ownership check va audit trail.

database.note: FE-06 reuse toan bo entity va table da tao tu FE-04/FE-05. TestCase.TestType = Boundary|Negative la diem khac biet duy nhat.

threePipelineArchitecture.description: FE-06 chia generation thanh 3 pipeline doc lap, user co the bat/tat tung pipeline.

pipelines.name: Path Parameter Mutations
pipelines.description: Generate test cases cho moi path parameter cua moi endpoint. Moi parameter tao nhieu mutations (null, empty, boundary, overflow, injection, wrongType).

pipelines.name: Body Mutations
pipelines.description: Generate test cases cho request body cua POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints. Gom 6 loai mutation: emptyBody, malformedJson, missingRequired, typeMismatch, overflow, invalidEnum. Them schema-based mutations neu co raw JSON schema.

pipelines.name: LLM Scenario Suggestions
pipelines.description: Goi n8n webhook de nhan goi y boundary/negative scenarios tu LLM. Su dung Observation-Confirmation prompt pattern. Cache ket qua 24h per-endpoint. Log interaction cho audit.

reliability.llmFailureNote: Neu LLM audit save fail, khong lam fail main flow. Log warning va tiep tuc.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: FE-06 bi chan (HTTP 409 ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED) neu test suite chua co approved/applied API order tu FE-05A.
AC-02: Generate boundary/negative test cases thanh cong khi FE-05A gate pass va it nhat 1 pipeline duoc bat.
AC-03: Path mutation pipeline tao test cases cho moi path parameter cua moi endpoint voi cac loai mutation (null, empty, boundary, overflow, injection, wrongType, specialChars).

AC-04: Body mutation pipeline tao 6 loai mutations cho POST/PUT/PATCH endpoints: emptyBody (3 variants), malformedJson (3 variants), missingRequired (per field), typeMismatch (per field), overflow (per numeric/string field), invalidEnum (per enum field).
AC-05: Schema-based mutations bo sung missing required field mutations tu JSON schema khi BodyParameters khong cover het.
AC-06: LLM suggestion pipeline goi n8n webhook 'generate-boundary-negative-scenarios' va parse response thanh LlmSuggestedScenario.
AC-07: LLM suggestions duoc cache per-endpoint voi TTL 24h. Cache hit tra ket qua ngay lap tuc khong goi LLM.
AC-08: LLM interaction duoc log vao LlmAssistant module (LlmInteraction entity) cho audit trail.
AC-09: Tat ca test cases duoc persist trong 1 transaction voi TestCaseChangeLog va TestSuiteVersion entries.
AC-10: ForceRegenerate=true xoa tat ca boundary/negative test cases hien co truoc khi generate moi.
AC-11: ForceRegenerate=false tra loi 400 neu da co boundary/negative test cases.
AC-12: Subscription limits duoc check truoc khi generate (MaxTestCasesPerSuite, MaxLlmCallsPerMonth).
AC-13: Subscription usage duoc increment sau khi generate thanh cong.
AC-14: Test cases duoc tag dung loai: 'boundary'|'negative', 'auto-generated', 'rule-based'|'llm-suggested', mutation-type-specific tags.
AC-15: Validation tra 400 neu khong bat it nhat 1 pipeline (IncludePathMutations=false AND IncludeBodyMutations=false AND IncludeLlmSuggestions=false).
AC-16: Suite duoc cap nhat Version++, Status=Ready, LastModifiedById sau khi generate.

testScenarios.name: Gate fail blocks generation
testScenarios.given: Test suite chua co approved API order (FE-05A)

testScenarios.name: Full pipeline generation
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, endpoints co path params va body params
testScenarios.when: POST generate-boundary-negative { IncludePathMutations: true, IncludeBodyMutations: true, IncludeLlmSuggestions: true }
testScenarios.then: Generate test cases tu ca 3 pipeline, persist tat ca, tra result voi counts

testScenarios.name: Path mutations only
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, endpoints co path params
testScenarios.when: POST generate-boundary-negative { IncludePathMutations: true, IncludeBodyMutations: false, IncludeLlmSuggestions: false }
testScenarios.then: Chi tao test cases tu path mutations, BodyMutationCount=0, LlmSuggestionCount=0

testScenarios.name: Body mutations only
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, POST endpoint co body params
testScenarios.when: POST generate-boundary-negative { IncludePathMutations: false, IncludeBodyMutations: true, IncludeLlmSuggestions: false }
testScenarios.then: Chi tao test cases tu body mutations, PathMutationCount=0, LlmSuggestionCount=0

testScenarios.name: LLM suggestions only
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, LLM available va khong co cache
testScenarios.when: POST generate-boundary-negative { IncludePathMutations: false, IncludeBodyMutations: false, IncludeLlmSuggestions: true }
testScenarios.then: Goi n8n webhook, parse scenarios, cache results, log interaction

testScenarios.name: LLM cache hit
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, LLM suggestions da cached (< 24h)
testScenarios.then: Khong goi n8n webhook, dung cached results, FromCache=true

testScenarios.name: Force regenerate replaces existing
testScenarios.given: Test suite da co 10 boundary/negative test cases
testScenarios.then: Xoa 10 test cases cu, generate moi, persist moi, Version++

testScenarios.name: Existing cases block without force
testScenarios.given: Test suite da co boundary/negative test cases
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'Test suite da co N boundary/negative test case(s). Su dung ForceRegenerate=true de tao lai.'

testScenarios.name: No pipelines enabled
testScenarios.when: POST generate-boundary-negative { IncludePathMutations: false, IncludeBodyMutations: false, IncludeLlmSuggestions: false }
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'It nhat mot nguon tao test case phai duoc bat.'

testScenarios.name: Subscription limit exceeded
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, user da vuot han muc subscription
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'Da vuot qua gioi han test case cho goi subscription.'

testScenarios.name: LLM call limit exceeded
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, user da vuot han muc LLM calls per month
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'Da vuot qua gioi han LLM calls cho goi subscription.'

testScenarios.name: Archived suite blocks generation
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'Khong the generate test cases cho test suite da archived.'

testScenarios.name: Non-owner blocks generation
testScenarios.given: Test suite owned by user A, current user is B
testScenarios.then: HTTP 400: 'Ban khong co quyen thao tac test suite nay.'

testScenarios.name: Empty generation result
testScenarios.given: Test suite co approved order, endpoints khong co path params va khong phai POST/PUT/PATCH, LLM tra empty
testScenarios.then: TotalGenerated=0, khong tao transaction, tra result rong

implementationOrder: 1. Models/BodyMutation.cs: BodyMutation model voi 6 mutation types.
2. Services/IBodyMutationEngine.cs + BodyMutationEngine.cs: Rule-based body mutation generator.
3. Services/ILlmScenarioSuggester.cs + LlmScenarioSuggester.cs: LLM scenario suggestion via n8n.
13. Integration tests: Full pipeline test voi mock n8n, gate fail/pass test.
